Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings Of Defendants Salesforce.Com, Inc. And Antonio Akins
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Russell Robinson, Esq. 415-861-4415 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Tom Geidt, Esq. 415-603-5003 of Grube Brown & Geidt LLP for Defendant ANTONIO AKINS, SALESFORCE.COM.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff argues waiver and cites Ramos decision. Defendant responds.
(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
